title: Round vs Floor vs Ceil : Swift
summary: Rounding up to the nearest Integer value functionality is something required a lot of times. Swift has a few inbuilt functions which can do the rounding up for us but they are a bit confusing. To decide when to use what, we need to understand which rounding function rounds up in which direction and which data types it can round up.
